por estrellas, que suele estar regulada por una organización oficial de clasificación hotelera o un tercero."}},"PropertySustainability:{}":{"__typename":"PropertySustainability","isSustainable":true,"certifications":[{"__typename":"PropertySustainabilityCertification","name":"Green Growth 2050","logoUrl":"https://q-xx.bstatic.com/xdata/images/xphoto/max2048/578708796.webp?k=5ea1b50d5e52454619473fd253434d5ac7224d3e881fb0ae0891f6c187578508\u0026o=","issuerDetails":[]}]},"TripTypesHotelPage:{}":{"__typename":"TripTypesHotelPage","nearbySkiLifts":null,"beaches":null,"closestTopBeach":null},"PropertyTripTypeLabelsInfo:{}":{"__typename":"PropertyTripTypeLabelsInfo","isSkiSeason":false,"enabledDestinationLabels":["BEACH_UFI"],"enabledPropertyLabels":["HAS_FREE_PRIVATE_BEACH","HAS_PRIVATE_BEACH","BEACH_FRONT","HAS_BEACH"]},"HotelTranslation:{}":{"__typename":"HotelTranslation","name":"Niyama Private Islands Maldives","description":"Boasting a 24-hour spa and the world's first underwater nightclub, the luxurious  Niyama Private Islands Maldives is tropical paradise offering a quiet private beach, Thakuru (Villa Host Services). and free WiFi is available in the rooms and throughout the resort. Rooms offered are luxurious beach pool villas and over water pool villas.\n\nSpacious and modern, the villas at Niyama Private Islands Maldives are located on the beach or over the crystal lagoon. Two to three bedroom villas complete with large infinity pools and commanding absolute privacy. All come with a 40-inch flat-screen TV, international TV channels, Bose surround sound system and a well-stocked minibar. Outdoor bathrooms have a soaking tub and soothing rainshowers. The accommodation has electric kettle, slippers and free toiletries.\n\nDrift Spa features relaxing body massage and other beauty treatments. Guided snorkelling trips, sunset cruises, manta ray snorkeling, and fishing trips can be arranged by the butlers. On-site, guests can also look forward to playing the latest video games, swimming in the main pool or exercising at the gym. Staff at the restaurant and spa can assist the guests. It houses a world class Kids Club which is one of the largest and the only kids club that caters from 12 months to 12 years old children.\n\nThe world’s first underwater restaurant-Subsix is located 6 metres below sea level and is known for its champagne breakfasts and glow parties fitted with glass walls with views of the underwater marine life. Edge is a modern fine dining restaurant, set 500 metres out in the ocean, accessible only by boat. Nest offers a surreal tree top setting perfect for romantic soirees, private and family dining serving Asian avant-garde cuisines including Thai, Cantonese, Teppanyaki, Japanese, Indonesian and more. Niyama Private Islands Maldives is the only resort in the Maldives to have an Afro Latin restaurant - Tribal that offers an innovative campsite dining experience showcasing exotic African, Central and South American dishes.\n\nNiyama Private Islands Maldives is a 40-minute sea plane ride from Male International Airport while Maldives’ Dhaalu Airport is now open to private jets transfers that can be arranged at an extra charge.\n\nDaily Outer Reef Snorkeling Experience Included\".","markupDescription":null,"finePrint":"The property can be reached by seaplanes and domestic flights.\nSeaplane transfer takes 45 minutes from Male International Airport.\nStandard Transfer Times: Daylight hours.\nDomestic flight transfer takes 25 minutes from Male International Airport, followed by a 5-minute speedboat transfer from Dhaalu Airport to the resort.\n\nChildren eat for free based on the rules and meal plan accompanied by an adult, excluding alcoholic beverages from the special set kids menu only.\nAdditional child in the room is charged at USD 61 per night and is added to the total cost separately.\nDaily dinner is based on a three-course meal per person, excluding beverages, at selected restaurants. Supplementary charges may apply to special items on the menu.\n\nTransfer options:\n\nSeaplane transfer\nFrom now to 31 December 2027\n- Adult: USD 780\n- Child (2-11): USD 390\n\nDomestic flight transfer\nFrom now to 31 December 2027\n- Adult: USD 550\n- Child (2-11): USD 275","metadata":{"__typename":"Metadata","formMetadata":[{"__typename":"FormMetadata","form":"description","actualLanguage":"en-gb","trackedExperiment":null,"generatorSignature":null},{"__typename":"FormMetadata","form":"finePrint","actualLanguage":"en-gb","trackedExperiment":null,"generatorSignature":null},{"__typename":"FormMetadata","form":"summary","actualLanguage":"en-gb","trackedExperiment":null,"generatorSignature":null}]}},"ContentTranslation:HOTEL/DESCRIPTION_EXP_AUTOGEN_HW_GOOGLE_MT_MANY_LANGS@348003":{"__typename":"ContentTranslation","id":"HOTEL/DESCRIPTION_EXP_AUTOGEN_HW_GOOGLE_MT_MANY_LANGS@348003","name":"Con un spa abierto las 24 horas y la primera discoteca submarina del mundo, las lujosas islas privadas Niyama Maldivas es un paraíso tropical que ofrece una tranquila playa privada, Thakuru (Servicios de Anfitrión de Villa). Además, hay conexión Wi-Fi gratuita en las habitaciones y en todo el complejo. Las habitaciones que se ofrecen son lujosas villas con piscina en la playa y villas con piscina sobre el agua.\n\nAmplias y modernas, las villas de Niyama Private Islands Las Maldivas se encuentran en la playa o sobre la laguna cristalina. Villas de dos o tres dormitorios con amplias piscinas infinitas y que garantizan absoluta privacidad. Todas incluyen televisor de pantalla plana de 40 pulgadas, canales de televisión internacionales, sistema de sonido envolvente Bose y minibar bien surtido. Los baños exteriores cuentan con bañera de hidromasaje y relajantes duchas de lluvia. El alojamiento dispone de hervidor eléctrico, zapatillas y artículos de aseo gratuitos.\n\nDrift Spa ofrece relajantes masajes corporales y otros tratamientos de belleza. Los mayordomos pueden organizar excursiones guiadas de snorkel, cruceros al atardecer, snorkel con mantarrayas y salidas de pesca. En las instalaciones, los huéspedes también podrán disfrutar de los últimos videojuegos, nadar en la piscina principal o hacer ejercicio en el gimnasio. El personal del restaurante y del spa puede ayudar a los huéspedes. Alberga un club infantil de primera categoría, uno de los más grandes y el único que atiende a niños de entre 12 meses y 12 años.\n\nEl primer restaurante submarino del mundo, Subsix, está situado a 6 metros bajo el nivel del mar y es conocido por sus desayunos con champán y fiestas luminosas, con paredes de cristal que ofrecen vistas de la vida marina submarina. Edge es un moderno restaurante de alta cocina, situado a 500 metros mar adentro, accesible únicamente en barco. Nest ofrece un entorno surrealista en las copas de los árboles, perfecto para veladas románticas, cenas privadas y familiares, y sirve cocina asiática vanguardista que incluye platos tailandeses, cantoneses, teppanyaki, japoneses, indonesios y más. Niyama Private Islands Maldives es el único resort en las Maldivas que cuenta con un restaurante afro-latino, Tribal, que ofrece una innovadora experiencia gastronómica en un campamento, presentando platos exóticos de África, América Central y del Sur.\n\nNiyama Private Islands Maldives se encuentra a 40 minutos en hidroavión del Aeropuerto Internacional de Malé, mientras que el Aeropuerto Dhaalu de Maldivas ya está abierto a traslados en jets privados que se pueden organizar con un cargo adicional."},"TopicFilter:72":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":72,"name":"Piscina","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:98":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":98,"name":"Agua","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:76":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":76,"name":"Cena","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:89":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":89,"name":"Restaurante","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:79":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":79,"name":"Limpieza","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:85":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":85,"name":"Coche","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:71":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":71,"name":"Ubicacion","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:75":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":75,"name":"Cocina","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:78":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":78,"name":"Aeropuerto","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:81":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":81,"name":"Español","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:82":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":82,"name":"Niños","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:97":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":97,"name":"Centro","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:103":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":103,"name":"Habitacion","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:104":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":104,"name":"Seguridad","isSelected":false,"translation":null}}</script><script
